text:
There was a forest that few dared enter. It had ominous trees with bark like steel. Every evening, bats would swarm those towering things.

There lived a girl named Willow. She loved the forest. Late last winter, a storm had turned leaves into rainbows. When the rain stopped, Willow discovered a small cave behind an ancient oak.

Inside was a mouse. She named it Mouse.

Mouse twitched his whiskers.

That night, Mouse jumped onto Willow's shoulder. She petted him.

Mouse sighed.

They visited frequently. Mouse liked storytelling.

After countless adventures, Willow knew.

There wouldn't EVER be another enchanted night like this. She didn't wanna let Mouse go.

So she hugged Mouse close.

And Mouse sniffed forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
